SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAXINE ANDERSON--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
